name: UACR ≥ 30 mg/g
description: Urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio is at least 30 mg/g.

name: eGFR > 25 mL/min/1.73m2
description: Estimated glomerular filtration rate is greater than 25 mL/min/1.73m2.

name: Serum potassium normal
description: Serum potassium level is within normal range.

description: Patient's eGFR is less than 20 mL/min/1.73m2.
